title: Otsu Multi-level Segmentation
description: Segment a volume into N intensity bins via Otsu's multi-thresholding. Emits a .seg.nrrd labelmap whose per-label names and RGB colors travel inside the file. Backed by ITK.

parameters.title: Input Volume
parameters.help: Input volume (DICOM, NIfTI, NRRD, MHA, etc.)

parameters.title: Number of levels
parameters.help: How many foreground labels to produce. Otsu picks N thresholds; you get N+1 bins (including background).

outputs.title: Output Labelmap
outputs.help: Multi-label segmentation (.seg.nrrd) with embedded per-label names and colors.
